rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.128 governs campaign treasurer notice duties for specific-purpose committees. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: If a specific-purpose committee accepts political contributions or makes political expenditures for a candidate or officeholder, the committee's campaign treasurer shall deliver written notice of that fact to the affected candidate or officeholder not later than the end of the period covered by the report in which the reportable activity occurs.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election code campaign-finance notice provision.
